title: Communauté d'agglomération du Pays de Landerneau-Daoulas
summary: Communauté d'agglomération du Pays de Landerneau-Daoulas (Breton: Kumuniezh kêrel Bro Landerne-Daoulaz) is the communauté d'agglomération, an intercommunal structure, centred on the town of Landerneau. It is located in the Finistère department, in the Brittany region, northwestern France. Created in 2009, its seat is in Landerneau. Its area is 371.4 km2. Its population was 49,030 in 2019, of which 15,918 in Landerneau proper.
text:
Communauté d'agglomération du Pays de Landerneau-Daoulas (Breton: Kumuniezh kêrel Bro Landerne-Daoulaz) is the communauté d'agglomération, an intercommunal structure, centred on the town of Landerneau. It is located in the Finistère department, in the Brittany region, northwestern France. Created in 2009, its seat is in Landerneau. Its area is 371.4 km2. Its population was 49,030 in 2019, of which 15,918 in Landerneau proper.

Composition
The communauté d'agglomération consists of the following 22 communes:
